There might be a good chance that  after downloading the file using data_manger .get() someone might accidentally delete it 
so the file stays in the database but is not present in the directory 

 https://github.com/sunpy/sunpy/blob/main/sunpy/data/data_manager/manager.py#L87-L97
when attempting to re-download it 
 and so line 97  (``` hash_file(details['file_path']) ``` throws error  since file has been deleted 

### To Reproduce

```
from sunpy.data import manager
import os 
@manager.require('test_file',
                 ['http://data.sunpy.org/sample-data/predicted-sunspot-radio-flux.txt'],
                 '4c85b04a5528aa97eb84a087450eda0421c71833820576330bba148564089b11')
def test2_function():
    return manager.get('test_file')

test2_function()

# file deleted 
os.remove("~/sunpy/data_manager/predicted-sunspot-radio-flux.txt")

test2_function()
```

+        pass

+    assert downloader.times_called == 0
+    assert len(storage._store) == 0

+    @manager.require('test_file', [f'file://{folder}/another_file'], MOCK_HASH,defer_download=True)
+    def deferred_function():
+        pass
+
+    deferred_function()
+    assert downloader.times_called == 0
+    assert len(storage._store) == 0

Describe the feature

Now that there is support for SPICE kernels, it would be very nice to have the functionality to query for SPICE kernels of solar missions (e.g. Solar Orbiter, PSP, STEREO-A etc). 

However we would have to think about how this is done, in terms of determining which kernels you would need etc. But there is definitely a need.

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
sunpy_map : Generic_map_object

inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

#7689

Describe the feature

Now that there is support for SPICE kernels, it would be very nice to have the functionality to query for SPICE kernels of solar missions (e.g. Solar Orbiter, PSP, STEREO-A etc). 

However we would have to think about how this is done, in terms of determining which kernels you would need etc. But there is definitely a need.

> 
> I think the approach isn't the one I would like to see. I think we should save the whole map object using the asdf support already in sunpy (i.e. make the tree `{'map': map_object}`).
> 
> I think this also means that it wont fit into the pattern of the `sunpy.io` layer where you have implemented it at the moment, it would need to be called as part of `GenericMap.save` itself rather than through io.

 so shall we add a separate method for saving asdf file in `Genericmap.save` itself 
like 

            if filepath.endswith("asdf"):

                   asdf.AsdfFile({'object':self}).write_to(filepath) 

         else :
                write(filepath)

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
object
 -------- Meta
 -------- Data


inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
sunpy_map : Generic_map_object

inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
sunpy_map : Generic_map_object

inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
sunpy_map : Generic_map_object

inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
sunpy_map : Generic_map_object

inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
sunpy_map : Generic_map_object

inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
sunpy_map : Generic_map_object

inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
sunpy_map : Generic_map_object

inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
sunpy_map : Generic_map_object

inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
sunpy_map : Generic_map_object

inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
sunpy_map : Generic_map_object

inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
sunpy_map : Generic_map_object

inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

A discussion about the approach and how sunpy handles the downloading, the storage and use of these files needs to occur.

Yes sure we should discuss how we should handle the query of spice files so here is my take 
-  so far I am thinking we should make multiple clients for multiple missions(each one having their own attributes) and register each one with fido
- this shall be more or less like web scrapping URL 

- now for downloading I have implanted a way where kernel link would be filtered (see ) based on search term from all given list of available kernel in a specific kernel URL and one which matches would be filtered I am planning to implement fido type download system (without path format keys)

-  for usage there is a Python module https://spiceypy.readthedocs.io/en/stable/

Describe the feature

@wtbarnes [asks](https://matrix.to/#/!MeRdFpEonLoCwhoHeT:matrix.org/$171907835316962pljCz:matrix.org?via=openastronomy.org&via=matrix.org&via=cadair.com):

> Is there a reason we couldn’t add asdf as a supported format in the map factory?

If we add support to map factory the questions that needs answering are how far down the asdf tree do we look for map objects to return? (Top level only? all of them?) and what do we do if we open a file with more than just the map object in? (Ignore it? Throw a warning?)

On the .save method side it would be easy enough to "if filename ends with .asdf make a tree and save it" although this would arguably move the asdf dependency into the map extra.

Describe the feature

@wtbarnes [asks](https://matrix.to/#/!MeRdFpEonLoCwhoHeT:matrix.org/$171907835316962pljCz:matrix.org?via=openastronomy.org&via=matrix.org&via=cadair.com):

> Is there a reason we couldn’t add asdf as a supported format in the map factory?

If we add support to map factory the questions that needs answering are how far down the asdf tree do we look for map objects to return? (Top level only? all of them?) and what do we do if we open a file with more than just the map object in? (Ignore it? Throw a warning?)

On the .save method side it would be easy enough to "if filename ends with .asdf make a tree and save it" although this would arguably move the asdf dependency into the map extra.

### Proposed solution

Describe the feature

@wtbarnes [asks](https://matrix.to/#/!MeRdFpEonLoCwhoHeT:matrix.org/$171907835316962pljCz:matrix.org?via=openastronomy.org&via=matrix.org&via=cadair.com):

> Is there a reason we couldn’t add asdf as a supported format in the map factory?

If we add support to map factory the questions that needs answering are how far down the asdf tree do we look for map objects to return? (Top level only? all of them?) and what do we do if we open a file with more than just the map object in? (Ignore it? Throw a warning?)

On the .save method side it would be easy enough to "if filename ends with .asdf make a tree and save it" although this would arguably move the asdf dependency into the map extra.

### Proposed solution

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html

Describe the feature

@wtbarnes [asks](https://matrix.to/#/!MeRdFpEonLoCwhoHeT:matrix.org/$171907835316962pljCz:matrix.org?via=openastronomy.org&via=matrix.org&via=cadair.com):

> Is there a reason we couldn’t add asdf as a supported format in the map factory?

If we add support to map factory the questions that needs answering are how far down the asdf tree do we look for map objects to return? (Top level only? all of them?) and what do we do if we open a file with more than just the map object in? (Ignore it? Throw a warning?)

On the .save method side it would be easy enough to "if filename ends with .asdf make a tree and save it" although this would arguably move the asdf dependency into the map extra.

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

{"action":"created","comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/sunpy/sunpy/pulls/comments/1676857895","pull_request_review_id":2176473809,"id":1676857895,"node_id":"PRRC_kwDOACEKh85j8tIn","diff_hunk":"@@ -0,0 +1,116 @@
+from pathlib import Path
+from collections import OrderedDict
+
+import numpy as np
+
+import asdf
+
+from sunpy.io._header import FileHeader
+
+__all__ = ["write","read","get_header","get_keys_name"]
+
+def write(fname, data, header, **kwargs):
+    """
+    Take data and header pairs and save it to asdf file.
+    inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
+
+    format:
+    map_name.asdf (main tree)
+        meta: (header info)
+
+        data : data blocks
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    fname : `str`
+        File name, with extension.
+    data : `numpy.ndarray`
+        n-dimensional data array.
+    header : `dict`
+        A header dictionary.
+    """
+    map_name = Path(fname)
+    map_name = map_name.name
+    data = data.astype("float64")
+    meta = dict(header)
+    with asdf.AsdfFile() as af:
+        af.tree={map_name:{"meta":meta,"data":data}}
+        af.write_to(fname,**kwargs)
+
+
+def read(fname,**kwargs):
+    """
+    Read a asdf file.
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    filepath : `str`
+        The asdf file to be read.
+
+
+    Returns
+    -------
+    `list`
+        A list of (data, header) tuples
+    """
+
+    with asdf.open(fname) as af:
+        map_name = get_keys_name(fname)

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

+from pathlib import Path
+from collections import OrderedDict
+
+import numpy as np
+
+import asdf
+
+from sunpy.io._header import FileHeader
+
+__all__ = ["write","read","get_header","get_keys_name"]
+
+def write(fname, data, header, **kwargs):
+    """
+    Take data and header pairs and save it to asdf file.
+    inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
+
+    format:
+    map_name.asdf (main tree)
+        meta: (header info)
+
+        data : data blocks
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    fname : `str`
+        File name, with extension.
+    data : `numpy.ndarray`
+        n-dimensional data array.
+    header : `dict`
+        A header dictionary.
+    """
+    map_name = Path(fname)
+    map_name = map_name.name
+    data = data.astype("float64")
+    meta = dict(header)
+    with asdf.AsdfFile() as af:
+        af.tree={map_name:{"meta":meta,"data":data}}
+        af.write_to(fname,**kwargs)
+
+
+def read(fname,**kwargs):
+    """
+    Read a asdf file.
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    filepath : `str`
+        The asdf file to be read.
+
+
+    Returns
+    -------
+    `list`
+        A list of (data, header) tuples
+    """
+
+    with asdf.open(fname) as af:
+        map_name = get_keys_name(fname)
+        try:
+            data = af[map_name]["data"].data
+            data_array = np.asarray(data)
+            meta_data= af[map_name]["meta"]
+            meta_data = OrderedDict(meta_data)
+            meta_data = FileHeader(meta_data)
+            return [(data_array,meta_data)]
+        except Exception:
+            data = af[map_name].data
+            meta_data = af[map_name].meta
+            meta_data = OrderedDict(meta_data)
+            meta_data = FileHeader(meta_data)
+            return [(data,meta_data)]
+
+def get_header(fname):
+    """
+    Read a asdf file and return just the headers (meta).
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    fname : `str`
+        The asdf file to be read.
+
+    Returns
+    -------
+    `list`
+        A list of `sunpy.io._header.FileHeader` headers.
+    """
+    with asdf.open(fname) as af:
+        map_name = get_keys_name(fname)
+        try:
+            meta_data= af[map_name]["meta"]
+            meta_data = OrderedDict(meta_data)
+            meta_data = FileHeader(meta_data)
+            return [meta_data]
+        except Exception:
+            meta_data = af[map_name].meta
+            meta_data = OrderedDict(meta_data)
+            meta_data = FileHeader(meta_data)
+            return [meta_data]
+
+

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

+import numpy as np
+
+import asdf
+
+from sunpy.data.test import get_test_filepath
+from sunpy.io._asdf import get_header, get_keys_name, read, write
+from sunpy.io._header import FileHeader
+
+AIA_MAP = get_test_filepath("aiamap_genericmap_1.0.0.asdf")
+
+
+def test_read():
+    cont = read(AIA_MAP)
+    assert isinstance(cont,list)
+    assert isinstance(cont[0][0],np.ndarray)
+    assert isinstance(cont[0][1],FileHeader)
+    assert cont[0][0].shape ==  (2,2)
+
+def test_write(tmpdir):
+    data,header = read(AIA_MAP)[0]
+    outfile = tmpdir / "test.asdf"
+    write(str(outfile),data,header)
+    assert outfile.exists()
+
+def test_get_header():
+    header = get_header(AIA_MAP)[0]
+    assert Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit

+import numpy as np
+
+import asdf
+
+from sunpy.data.test import get_test_filepath
+from sunpy.io._asdf import get_header, get_keys_name, read, write
+from sunpy.io._header import FileHeader
+
+map_for_asdf = get_test_filepath("aiamap_genericmap_1.0.0.asdf")
+
+def test_read():
+    cont = read(map_for_asdf)
+    assert isinstance(cont,list)
+    assert isinstance(cont[0][0],np.ndarray)
+    assert isinstance(cont[0][1],FileHeader)
+    assert cont[0][0].shape ==  (2,2)
+
+def test_write(tmpdir):
+    data, header = read(map_for_asdf)[0]
+    outfile = tmpdir / "test.asdf"
+    write(str(outfile), data, header)
+    assert Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `
inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

+from pathlib import Path

+import asdf

+from sunpy.io._header import FileHeader

+def write(fname, data, header, **kwargs):
+    """
+    Take ``(data, header)`` pairs and save it to an ASDF file.
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    fname : `str`
+        File name, with extension.
+    data : `numpy.ndarray`
+        N-dimensional data array.
+    header : `dict`
+        A header dictionary.
+    """
+    map_name = Path(fname)
+    map_name = map_name.name
+    ty = data.dtype
+    data = data.astype(ty)
+    meta = dict(header)
+    with asdf.AsdfFile(copy_arrays=True) as af:
+        af.tree = {map_name : {"meta" : meta, "data" : data}}
+        af.write_to(fname)
+

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
map.asdf
 -------- Meta
 -------- Data


inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

{"action":"created","comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/sunpy/sunpy/pulls/comments/1683323722","pull_request_review_id":2186615154,"id":1683323722,"node_id":"PRRC_kwDOACEKh85kVXtK","diff_hunk":"@@ -0,0 +1,109 @@
+from pathlib import Path
+from collections import OrderedDict
+
+import numpy as np
+
+import asdf
+
+from sunpy.io._header import FileHeader
+
+__all__ = ["write", "read", "get_header", "get_keys_name"]
+
+def write(fname, data, header, **kwargs):
+    """
+    Take ``(data, header)`` pairs and save it to an ASDF file.
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    fname : `str`
+        File name, with extension.
+    data : `numpy.ndarray`
+        N-dimensional data array.
+    header : `dict`
+        A header dictionary.
+    """
+    map_name = Path(fname)
+    map_name = map_name.name
+    ty = data.dtype
+    data = data.astype(ty)
+    meta = dict(header)
+    with asdf.AsdfFile(copy_arrays=True) as af:
+        af.tree = {map_name : {"meta" : meta, "data" : data}}
+        af.write_to(fname)
+
+
+def read(fname, **kwargs):
+    """
+    Read an ASDF file.
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    filepath : `str`
+        The ASDF file to be read.
+
+    Returns
+    -------
+    `list`
+        A list of ``(data, header)`` tuples.
+    """
+
+    with asdf.open(fname) as af:
+        map_name = get_keys_name(fname)
+        if isinstance(af[map_name],dict):
+            data = af[map_name]["data"].data
+            data_array = np.asarray(data)
+            meta_data= af[map_name]["meta"]
+            meta_data = OrderedDict(meta_data)
+            meta_data = FileHeader(meta_data)
+            return [(data_array,meta_data)]
+        else:
+            data = af[map_name].data
+            meta_data = af[map_name].meta
+            meta_data = FileHeader(meta_data)
+            return [(data,meta_data)]
+
+def get_header(fname):
+    """
+    Read an ASDF file and return just the header(s).
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    fname : `str`
+        The ASDF file to be read.
+
+    Returns
+    -------
+    `list`
+        A list of `sunpy.io._header.FileHeader` headers.
+    """
+    with asdf.open(fname) as af:
+        map_name = get_keys_name(fname)
+        if isinstance(af[map_name], dict):
+            meta_data= af[map_name]["meta"]
+            meta_data = OrderedDict(meta_data)
+            meta_data = FileHeader(meta_data)
+            return [meta_data]
+        else:
+            meta_data = af[map_name].meta
+            meta_data = FileHeader(meta_data)
+            return [meta_data]
+
+

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
map.asdf
 -------- Meta
 -------- Data


inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
map.asdf
 -------- Meta
 -------- Data


inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

{"action":"created","comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/sunpy/sunpy/pulls/comments/1683350343","pull_request_review_id":2186657027,"id":1683350343,"node_id":"PRRC_kwDOACEKh85kVeNH","diff_hunk":"@@ -0,0 +1,109 @@
+from pathlib import Path
+from collections import OrderedDict
+
+import numpy as np
+
+import asdf
+
+from sunpy.io._header import FileHeader
+
+__all__ = ["write", "read", "get_header", "get_keys_name"]
+
+def write(fname, data, header, **kwargs):
+    """
+    Take ``(data, header)`` pairs and save it to an ASDF file.
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    fname : `str`
+        File name, with extension.
+    data : `numpy.ndarray`
+        N-dimensional data array.
+    header : `dict`
+        A header dictionary.
+    """
+    map_name = Path(fname)
+    map_name = map_name.name
+    ty = data.dtype
+    data = data.astype(ty)
+    meta = dict(header)
+    with asdf.AsdfFile(copy_arrays=True) as af:
+        af.tree = {map_name : {"meta" : meta, "data" : data}}
+        af.write_to(fname)","path":"sunpy/io/_asdf.py","commit_id":"068a449a9b146367fc897215bcef26a5f8a0cc7f","original_commit_id":"068a449a9b146367fc897215bcef26a5f8a0cc7f","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":"hey Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
map.asdf
 -------- Meta
 -------- Data


inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

> 
> I'll respond to those above.
> 
> There is a general question which is what is the expected file structure when `save` is called. It looks like the `save` machinery only passes `data` and `meta` to the low level functions. This means that (for example) a saved `Map` does not use the map tag. This makes using the https://github.com/sunpy/sunpy/blob/main/sunpy/data/test/aiamap_genericmap_1.0.0.asdf not that helpful since it contains a map saved with the map tag:
> 
> ```yaml
> object: !<tag:sunpy.org:sunpy/map/generic_map-1.0.0>
> ```
> 
> Whereas a map saved with `Map.save` never passes the `Map` instance to the save functions so unless we create a new `Map` in `write` and then write that map a user that uses `asdf.open` to open a file saved with `Map.save` won't get a map.

+from collections import OrderedDict
+
+import asdf
+from astropy.utils.introspection import minversion
+
+from sunpy.io._header import FileHeader
+
+__all__ = ["write", "read", "get_header"]
+
+# use memmap for and after asdf 3.1.0 to avoid a warning
+# for the deprecated copy_arrays
+if minversion(asdf, "3.1.0"):
+    _NO_MEMMAP_KWARGS = {"memmap": False, "lazy_load": False}
+else:
+    _NO_MEMMAP_KWARGS = {"copy_arrays": True, "lazy_load": False}
+
+
+def write(filepath, data, header, **kwargs):
+    """
+    Take ``(data, header)`` pairs and save it to an ASDF file.
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    filepath : pathlib.Path, str
+        File name, with extension.
+    data : `numpy.ndarray`
+        N-dimensional data array.
+    header : `dict`
+        A header dictionary.
+    """
+    asdf.AsdfFile({"object": {"meta": OrderedDict(header), "data": data}}).write_to(str(filepath), **kwargs)
+
+
+def read(filepath, **kwargs):
+    """
+    Read an ASDF file.
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    filepath : pathlib.Path, `str`
+        The ASDF file to be read.
+
+    Returns
+    -------
+    `list`
+        A list of ``(data, header)`` tuples.
+    """
+    # Provide the required options to prevent asdf from memory mapping
+    # or lazy loading the data as the file will be closed at the end of
+    # _read_obj.
+    obj = _read_obj(str(filepath), **_NO_MEMMAP_KWARGS)
+    return [(obj["data"][:], FileHeader(obj["meta"]))]
+
+
+def get_header(filepath):
+    """
+    Read an ASDF file and return just the header(s).
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    filepath : pathlib.Path, str
+        The ASDF file to be read.
+
+    Returns
+    -------
+    `list`
+        A list of `sunpy.io._header.FileHeader` headers.
+    """
+    return [FileHeader(_read_obj(str(filepath))["meta"])]
+

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
object
 -------- Meta
 -------- Data


inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

+from collections import OrderedDict
+
+import asdf
+from astropy.utils.introspection import minversion
+
+from sunpy.io._header import FileHeader
+
+__all__ = ["write", "read", "get_header"]
+
+# use memmap for and after asdf 3.1.0 to avoid a warning
+# for the deprecated copy_arrays
+if minversion(asdf, "3.1.0"):
+    _NO_MEMMAP_KWARGS = {"memmap": False, "lazy_load": False}
+else:
+    _NO_MEMMAP_KWARGS = {"copy_arrays": True, "lazy_load": False}
+
+
+def write(filepath, data, header, **kwargs):
+    """
+    Take ``(data, header)`` pairs and save it to an ASDF file.
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    filepath : pathlib.Path, str
+        File name, with extension.
+    data : `numpy.ndarray`
+        N-dimensional data array.
+    header : `dict`
+        A header dictionary.
+    """
+    asdf.AsdfFile({"object": {"meta": OrderedDict(header), "data": data}}).write_to(str(filepath), **kwargs)
+
+
+def read(filepath, **kwargs):
+    """
+    Read an ASDF file.
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    filepath : pathlib.Path, `str`
+        The ASDF file to be read.
+
+    Returns
+    -------
+    `list`
+        A list of ``(data, header)`` tuples.
+    """
+    # Provide the required options to prevent asdf from memory mapping
+    # or lazy loading the data as the file will be closed at the end of
+    # _read_obj.
+    obj = _read_obj(str(filepath), **_NO_MEMMAP_KWARGS)
+    return [(obj["data"][:], FileHeader(obj["meta"]))]
+
+
+def get_header(filepath):
+    """
+    Read an ASDF file and return just the header(s).
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    filepath : pathlib.Path, str
+        The ASDF file to be read.
+
+    Returns
+    -------
+    `list`
+        A list of `sunpy.io._header.FileHeader` headers.
+    """
+    return [FileHeader(_read_obj(str(filepath))["meta"])]
+
+

Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
object
 -------- Meta
 -------- Data


inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
object
 -------- Meta
 -------- Data


inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file

> 
> I'll respond to those above.
> 
> There is a general question which is what is the expected file structure when `save` is called. It looks like the `save` machinery only passes `data` and `meta` to the low level functions. This means that (for example) a saved `Map` does not use the map tag. This makes using the https://github.com/sunpy/sunpy/blob/main/sunpy/data/test/aiamap_genericmap_1.0.0.asdf not that helpful since it contains a map saved with the map tag:
> 
> ```yaml
> object: !<tag:sunpy.org:sunpy/map/generic_map-1.0.0>
> ```
> 
> Whereas a map saved with `Map.save` never passes the `Map` instance to the save functions so unless we create a new `Map` in `write` and then write that map a user that uses `asdf.open` to open a file saved with `Map.save` won't get a map.

but what if we have some scientific instrument (like a telescope ) which sends data and meta but with different file structures how do we account for that ? +import os
+from collections import OrderedDict
+
+import numpy as np
+
+import asdf
+from asdf.tags.core import NDArrayType
+from astropy.utils.introspection import minversion
+
+from sunpy.io._header import FileHeader
+
+__all__ = ["write", "read", "get_header"]
+
+# use memmap for and after asdf 3.1.0 to avoid a warning
+# for the deprecated copy_arrays
+if minversion(asdf, "3.1.0"):
+    _NO_MEMMAP_KWARGS = {"memmap": False, "lazy_load": False}
+else:
+    _NO_MEMMAP_KWARGS = {"copy_arrays": True, "lazy_load": False}
+
+
+def write(filepath, data, header, overwrite=False, **kwargs):
+    """
+    Take ``(data, header)`` pairs and save it to an ASDF file.
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    filepath : pathlib.Path, str
+        File name, with extension.
+    data : `numpy.ndarray`
+        N-dimensional data array.
+    header : `dict`
+        A header dictionary.
+    overwrite : bool, optional
+        If True, overwrite the file if it already exists. Default is False.
+    """
+    if os.path.exists(filepath) and not overwrite:
+        raise FileExistsError(f"The file '{filepath}' already exists. ","user":{"login":"Sauravroy34","id":136881235,"node_id":"U_kgDOCCikUw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/136881235?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34","html_url":"https://github.com/Sauravroy34","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sauravroy34/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":" Added support for saving a map in  asdf file using .save 

here is an example 
` import astropy.units as u `
` import sunpy `
` import sunpy.data.sample ` 
` import sunpy.map `

` aia_map = sunpy.map.Map(sunpy.data.sample.AIA_171_IMAGE) `
` aia_map.save("map.asdf") `


map.asdf:-
(File structure)
object
 -------- Meta
 -------- Data


inspired from https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/generated/gallery/saving_and_loading_data/genericmap_in_asdf.html
edit 
Added support for loading generic sunpy map with asdf extension  similar to fits file
